violations.name: PARKING NEAR TRAFFIC LIGHT OR ZEBRA CROSS
PARKING OPPOSITE TO ANOTHER PARKED VEHICLE

method.index: 100 * (0.34 weighted obstruction + 0.18 density + 0.15 junction exposure + 0.13 arterial obstruction + 0.10 peak recurrence + 0.06 active-day recurrence + 0.04 severity)
notes: Weighted obstruction uses passenger-car-unit style vehicle weights and violation severity.
Congestion impact is a transparent proxy because the supplied dataset contains violations, not measured speeds.
The output ranks where illegal parking is most likely to reduce effective carriageway capacity.
